tasks.subject: [relay-adapter-dx] [P2] Add apiVersion field to AdapterManifest schema
tasks.description:
Add an optional `apiVersion` field to the `AdapterManifestSchema` in `packages/shared/src/relay-adapter-schemas.ts`.

Update the schema definition (around line 191-205):

```typescript
// BEFORE:
export const AdapterManifestSchema = z
  .object({
    type: z.string(),
    displayName: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
    iconEmoji: z.string().optional(),
    category: AdapterCategorySchema,
    docsUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
    builtin: z.boolean(),
    configFields: z.array(ConfigFieldSchema),
    setupSteps: z.array(AdapterSetupStepSchema).optional(),
    setupInstructions: z.string().optional(),
    multiInstance: z.boolean().default(false),
  })
  .openapi('AdapterManifest');

// AFTER:
export const AdapterManifestSchema = z
  .object({
    type: z.string(),
    displayName: z.string(),
    description: z.string(),
    iconEmoji: z.string().optional(),
    category: AdapterCategorySchema,
    docsUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
    builtin: z.boolean(),
    configFields: z.array(ConfigFieldSchema),
    setupSteps: z.array(AdapterSetupStepSchema).optional(),
    setupInstructions: z.string().optional(),
    multiInstance: z.boolean().default(false),
    /** Relay adapter API version this adapter targets (e.g., '0.1.0'). */
    apiVersion: z.string().optional(),
  })
  .openapi('AdapterManifest');
```

This is a non-breaking additive change. The field is optional, so all existing manifests remain valid. The `AdapterManifest` TypeScript type automatically picks up the new field via `z.infer<>`.

Verify existing tests still pass. Check `packages/shared/src/__tests__/relay-catalog-schemas.test.ts` for any manifest test fixtures that may need updating (they should pass as-is since the field is optional).

Acceptance criteria:
- `AdapterManifestSchema` accepts an optional `apiVersion` string field
- `AdapterManifest` TypeScript type includes `apiVersion?: string`
- All existing manifest validation tests pass without changes
- `pnpm typecheck` passes across the monorepo
- The fallback manifest in `adapter-plugin-loader.ts` `extractManifest()` does NOT include `apiVersion` (correct — fallback manifests should not declare a version they don't know about)
tasks.activeForm: Adding apiVersion field to AdapterManifest schema

tasks.subject: [relay-adapter-dx] [P3] Move webhook adapter into subdirectory
tasks.description:
Move the webhook adapter from a standalone file into a proper subdirectory to match the telegram/ and claude-code/ adapter structure.

Current location:
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook-adapter.ts` (monolithic file)
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/webhook-adapter.test.ts`

Target location:
```
packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/
├── webhook-adapter.ts
├── index.ts
└── __tests__/
    └── webhook-adapter.test.ts
```

Steps:

1. Create directory `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/`

2. Move `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook-adapter.ts` to `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/webhook-adapter.ts`
   - Update the internal import paths. The `types.js` import changes from `'../types.js'` to `'../../types.js'`:
     ```typescript
     // BEFORE:
     import type { RelayAdapter, AdapterStatus, AdapterContext, DeliveryResult, WebhookAdapterConfig, RelayPublisher } from '../types.js';
     // AFTER:
     import type { RelayAdapter, AdapterStatus, AdapterContext, DeliveryResult, WebhookAdapterConfig, RelayPublisher } from '../../types.js';
     ```

3. Create `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/index.ts`:
   ```typescript
   /**
    * Webhook adapter module.
    *
    * @module relay/adapters/webhook
    */
   export { WebhookAdapter, verifySignature, WEBHOOK_MANIFEST } from './webhook-adapter.js';
   ```

4. Move `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/webhook-adapter.test.ts` to `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/__tests__/webhook-adapter.test.ts`
   - Update the import path in the test file:
     ```typescript
     // BEFORE (likely):
     import { WebhookAdapter, verifySignature } from '../webhook-adapter.js';
     // AFTER:
     import { WebhookAdapter, verifySignature } from '../webhook-adapter.js';
     ```
     (The relative import from `__tests__/` to the parent `webhook-adapter.ts` stays the same since both moved together)

5. Update `packages/relay/src/index.ts` barrel export:
   ```typescript
   // BEFORE:
   export { WebhookAdapter, verifySignature, WEBHOOK_MANIFEST } from './adapters/webhook-adapter.js';
   // AFTER:
   export { WebhookAdapter, verifySignature, WEBHOOK_MANIFEST } from './adapters/webhook/index.js';
   ```

6. Delete the old `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook-adapter.ts` file (now moved)

7. If `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/` directory is now empty after moving webhook tests, delete it (claude-code tests will be moved in task 3.2)

Acceptance criteria:
- `WebhookAdapter` is in `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/webhook-adapter.ts`
- Barrel export at `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/index.ts`
- Test file at `packages/relay/src/adapters/webhook/__tests__/webhook-adapter.test.ts`
- All existing imports via `@dorkos/relay` continue to work (barrel re-export updated)
- `pnpm test` passes in the relay package
- `pnpm typecheck` passes across the monorepo
- No import path changes needed outside `packages/relay/`
tasks.activeForm: Moving webhook adapter into standardized subdirectory

tasks.subject: [relay-adapter-dx] [P3] Co-locate adapter tests into per-adapter __tests__ directories
tasks.description:
Move all adapter test files from inconsistent locations into per-adapter `__tests__/` directories for consistency.

Current test file locations:
- `packages/relay/src/__tests__/adapters/telegram-adapter.test.ts` (nested under root `__tests__`)
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/claude-code-adapter.test.ts` (under adapters `__tests__`)
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/claude-code-adapter-correlation.test.ts` (under adapters `__tests__`)

Target locations:
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/telegram/__tests__/telegram-adapter.test.ts`
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/claude-code/__tests__/claude-code-adapter.test.ts`
- `packages/relay/src/adapters/claude-code/__tests__/claude-code-adapter-correlation.test.ts`

Steps:

1. **Move Telegram test:**
   - Move `packages/relay/src/__tests__/adapters/telegram-adapter.test.ts` to `packages/relay/src/adapters/telegram/__tests__/telegram-adapter.test.ts`
   - Update import paths in the test file. The imports currently reference the adapter relative to the old location. After moving, the adapter import should be:
     ```typescript
     // Likely BEFORE:
     import { TelegramAdapter } from '../../adapters/telegram/index.js';
     // AFTER:
     import { TelegramAdapter } from '../index.js';
     ```
   - Check all other imports in the file (types, mocks, etc.) and update relative paths accordingly. Types from `../../types.js` become `../../../types.js` or use the barrel.

2. **Move Claude Code tests:**
   - Move `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/claude-code-adapter.test.ts` to `packages/relay/src/adapters/claude-code/__tests__/claude-code-adapter.test.ts`
   - Move `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/claude-code-adapter-correlation.test.ts` to `packages/relay/src/adapters/claude-code/__tests__/claude-code-adapter-correlation.test.ts`
   - Update import paths. The imports currently reference `'../claude-code/claude-code-adapter.js'`. After moving, they should reference `'../claude-code-adapter.js'`.

3. **Clean up empty directories:**
   - Delete `packages/relay/src/__tests__/adapters/` directory (should be empty after moving telegram test)
   - Delete `packages/relay/src/adapters/__tests__/` directory (should be empty after moving webhook test in task 3.1 and claude-code tests here)

4. **Verify no other files reference the old test paths.** Search for imports that reference the old locations. Also check any vitest config or test patterns that might be path-specific.

Acceptance criteria:
- Telegram test at `packages/relay/src/adapters/telegram/__tests__/telegram-adapter.test.ts`
- Claude Code tests at `packages/relay/src/adapters/claude-code/__tests__/claude-code-adapter.test.ts` and `claude-code-adapter-correlation.test.ts`
- Empty parent `__tests__` directories removed
- All test import paths updated and resolving correctly
- `pnpm test` passes in the relay package — all previously passing tests still pass
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
- Consistent pattern: every adapter directory has its own `__tests__/` subdirectory
tasks.activeForm: Co-locating adapter tests into per-adapter directories
